parsed_review.recommendation: Proceed with CP00-129 closeout. The pack satisfies every in-scope requirement and introduces no prohibited runtime behavior.
parsed_review.rationale: Scope verified against the diff. (1) Coverage: CP129_PHASES yields 1 (RP02.P08.M03.S22 operator summary, terminal) + 20 (RP02.P08.M04.S01-S20 secondary workflow) + 19 (RP02.P08.M05.S01-S19 permission/audit binding opening) = 40 units; first/last unit ids and per-phase/domain/deliverable counts (implementation 16, hermes_evidence 20, claude_review 2, test 2) match validatePermissionKernelCp129Coverage and the contract/script/test assertions, and source unit ids are unique. (2) Inheritance: createPermissionKernelCp129HermesEvidenceWorkflowBinding reads CP128 harness result_count (150), next-gate readiness, Claude non-execution, and audit-summary reference-only via imported CP128 functions; these are self-checked (inherited_* must be true/150 or coverage fails), so inheritance is metadata-only. (3) No-write/synthetic: freezeNoWriteResult and CP129_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION force all 19 boundary flags false on every case result; operator_summary has hidden_fields_rendered=false and contains_real_data=false; hermes_evidence_binding is reference_only with writes_hermes_runtime/emitted_to_audit_ledger/changed_files_disclose_raw_diff/command_result_discloses_raw_output all false; permission_audit_binding does not emit to ledger or mutate policy or expose unauthorized counts. (4) Markers/semantics: claude_dependency_marker.executes_claude_review=false and read_only=true; human_approval_marker.grants_human_approval=false and reference_only; PASS/PASS_WITH_FINDINGS/BLOCK bound with block_prevents_production_ready=true; regression_receipt deterministic/non-persistent/no runtime harness; closeout_handoff commits_pack=false and marks_production_ready=false. (5) Prohibited additions: the new module is pure frozen-data logic under packages/authz/src with only an index.js re-export and read-only test/validation additions — no UI/API routes, no permission mutation, no audit/product/db writes, no idempotency/lock persistence, no retry/rollback/compensation, no export/share, no AI/analytics execution, no LDIP, and hrx_embedded_boundary stays embedded (no HRX split). Replay/command strings and Hermes command_anchors are stored as reference data and never executed. Contract bump (v0.23, current_pack CP00-129 Risk B 40 units, production_ready_flag updated, hermes_evidence_workflow_binding_pack block, 11 public_exports, 10 hidden_source_fields, 19-flag no_write_attestation) is internally consistent and cross-checked by the validation script; hidden_source_fields are declared suppression names, not real data. Handoff fixed to CP00-130 / RP02.P08.M05.S20. No P0-P3 issues identified.
